authors: Kate Wright Dani Madrid-Morales Christopher Barrie a University of Edinburghb University of Sheffieldc New York University
raw_title: Beyond “Emergencies?" Reporting on Humanitarian Issues Around the World
title_en: Beyond “Emergencies?” Reporting on Humanitarian Issues Around the World
title_zh: 超越“紧急情况”？全球人道主义议题报道研究
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了新闻报道如何超越简单的紧急事件报道，更全面地呈现全球人道主义议题。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how news reporting can move beyond simple emergency coverage to present global humanitarian issues more comprehensively.
research_direction_zh: 探索新闻媒体如何改进人道主义议题的报道框架和叙事方式，促进更深入、更持久的公众关注。
research_direction_en: Exploring how news media can improve reporting frameworks and narrative approaches for humanitarian issues to foster deeper and more sustained public engagement.
